struct Order {
    id: u64,
    amount: f64,
    timestamp: u64,
}

fn get_highest_order(orders: &[Order]) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.iter().max_by(|a, b| a.amount.partial_cmp(&b.amount).unwrap())
}

fn get_latest_order(orders: &[Order]) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.iter().max_by_key(|o| o.timestamp)
}

fn get_smallest_amount(orders: &[Order]) -> Option<f64> {
    orders.iter().map(|o| o.amount).reduce(f64::min)
}

fn get_earliest_order(orders: &[Order]) -> Option<&Order> {
    orders.iter().min_by_key(|o| o.timestamp)
}

fn top_n_by_amount(orders: &mut Vec<Order>, n: usize) {
    orders.select_nth_unstable_by(n, |a, b| b.amount.partial_cmp(&a.amount).unwrap());
    orders.truncate(n);
}
